parameters: Everyone's really hurt. I have more medicine, but not enough for
all the demons who need it.
Hmm... There's so much human medicine here. I've tried reading
the ingredients, but I still can't make much sense of it.
Well, medicine's medicine! I'll just pick something that looks right
No matter how many I treat, the patients keep on coming.
Is it never going to end?
There's been a great smell floating about lately. Man, I'm so hungry.
We're expecting a lot from you, Deathpolca!
The bleeding's finally stopped. I need to heal up and head back
Sorry, let me just take a nap...
A soldier and I stabbed each other, and I'm the one who survived. Ow.
I took some medicine, and now my head's killing me. Was it a
Shit, my race prides itself on our power in the skies, and I went
and got my wings messed up...
Urgh... My belly hurts. Maybe I ate something bad?
Ahhh... Hahaha! Ahhh... Eh? What? Did you just say something?
They should be in the infirmary. I'll pay them a visit.
Lord Todeira told me what's going on. You're heading out to look
The castle and the town were really messed up by the battle.
I'll give you a lift to the estate.
We're extremely busy treating all of the wounded demons
We're extremely busy treating all of the wounded demons
